items.title: How I’m getting the most out of Fable before July 7: 1.
items.title_zh: 我如何在 7 月 7 日之前充分利用《神鬼寓言》：1。
items.description: How I’m getting the most out of Fable before July 7: 1. Prep context with cheaper models 2. Plan with Fable, execute with another model 3. Use lower effort, like Medium, and babysit what Fable is doing 📌 Watch my full tutorial for 5 Fable…
items.description_zh: 我如何在 7 月 7 日之前充分利用《神鬼寓言》： 1. 使用更便宜的模型准备上下文 2. 用《神鬼寓言》进行计划，用另一个模型执行 3. 使用较低的工作量，例如中型，并照看《神鬼寓言》正在做的事情 📌 观看我的 5 《神鬼寓言》的完整教程...

items.title: Thought I’d share a fun activity I did with my 8-year-old daughter and Codex today: 1.
items.title_zh: 今天我想和我 8 岁的女儿以及 Codex 分享一项有趣的活动：1.
items.description: Thought I’d share a fun activity I did with my 8-year-old daughter and Codex today: 1. She drew a picture of a dragon. 2. We uploaded her drawing to Codex and used image gen to make a few more dragon poses. She used voice to give Codex fee…
items.description_zh: 今天我想和我 8 岁的女儿和 Codex 分享一个有趣的活动：1.她画了一张龙的图画。 2. 我们将她的画上传到 Codex，并使用 image gen 制作了更多龙的姿势。她用语音交了法典费……

items.title: I've heard a lot of questions about Fable's availability on subscription plans.
items.title_zh: 我听到很多关于《神鬼寓言》订阅计划可用性的问题。
items.description: I've heard a lot of questions about Fable's availability on subscription plans. While it will come off subscriptions after July 7th, we aim to restore Fable as a standard part of our subscriptions as soon as capacity allows, as we mentione…
items.description_zh: 我听到很多关于《神鬼寓言》订阅计划可用性的问题。虽然它将在 7 月 7 日之后取消订阅，但我们的目标是在容量允许的情况下尽快将《神鬼寓言》恢复为我们订阅的标准部分，正如我们提到的……

items.title: We've been explaining AI Gateway as a C̶o̶n̶t̶e̶n̶t̶ Token Delivery Network.
items.title_zh: 我们一直将 AI Gateway 解释为 C̶o̶n̶t̶e̶n̶t̶ 令牌交付网络。
items.description: We've been explaining AI Gateway as a C̶o̶n̶t̶e̶n̶t̶ Token Delivery Network. Like a CDN for AI models. One great feature of CDNs is the ability to dynamically re-route or deny traffic without redeployment. When Fable was suddenly retired,…
items.description_zh: 我们一直将 AI Gateway 解释为 C̶o̶n̶t̶e̶n̶t̶ 令牌交付网络。就像人工智能模型的 CDN。 CDN 的一大功能是能够动态重新路由或拒绝流量，而无需重新部署。当《神鬼寓言》突然退休时，……
